question: Who compiled the trip packet?
reference_answer: D. Auerbach, Activities Director, Cedar Hollow Middle School.

question: Which section reproduces the v3 operational roster?
reference_answer: Section 1.4 (Roster v3).

question: Which policy defines who counts toward the chaperone ratio?
reference_answer: Policy SCO-CH-3 (Chaperone Counting Rules).

question: Where are roster v1 and v2 physically retained for audit?
reference_answer: Activities Office filing cabinet 3, drawer 2 (audit binder).

question: Who is the lead chaperone?
reference_answer: T. Mendez.

question: Which section documents the temporary in-day assignment of S-007?
reference_answer: Section 6.1 (and the assignment is documented in scheduling note SCH-2026-05-02-A).

question: What is the role of A. Diaz on the trip?
reference_answer: Parent observer (parent of S-014); permitted to observe Group B events Saturday afternoon only; does not count toward the chaperone ratio and does not lodge with the group.

question: What is the destination institution of the trip?
reference_answer: Marwick University, Regional Science Olympiad Tournament 14.

question: What is the room number assigned to the school nurse?
reference_answer: Marwick Hall room 206 (medical-coverage station).

question: Which policy sets the minimum chaperone ratio?
reference_answer: Policy CHPS-OF-12 (Off-Site Activity Standards); minimum 1 chaperone per 10 students for grades 7–8 off-site overnight.

question: What is the packet ID?
reference_answer: CHMS-RSO-2026-T07

question: What is the correction notice ID issued on 2026-04-15?
What is the device ID of the handheld attendance scanner?
reference_answer: DEV-SCAN-07

question: What is the accommodation reference for S-024?
What is V. Lee's bus driver license number?
reference_answer: CDL-MA-44291

question: What is the accommodation reference for S-031?
On what date was roster v2 issued?
On what date was the v2 errata (S-022 duplicate assignment) discovered?
reference_answer: 2026-04-14 (discovered by team coach P. Rivera).

question: What time does Bus 1 depart Cedar Hollow on 2026-05-01?
What is the duration of S-007's temporary Group C presenter-aide assignment?
What is the time window during which A. Diaz is permitted to observe Group B events?
reference_answer: 2026-05-02 13:00–17:00 (Saturday afternoon, Group B events only).

question: On what date did S-018 withdraw?
How many students are in v3 Group A?
reference_answer: 12 students.

question: How many students are in v3 Group C?
reference_answer: 13 students.

question: What is the operational student total for the trip?
reference_answer: 35 students (per v3, which is operational).

question: List the student IDs in v3 Group B.
How many adults are present on the trip across all roles?
reference_answer: 8 adults: T. Mendez, J. Phelps, K. Rosario, M. Okonkwo, N. Park, V. Lee, R. Esposito, A. Diaz.

question: How many adults count toward the chaperone ratio?
reference_answer: 4 chaperones count toward ratio: T. Mendez, J. Phelps, K. Rosario, M. Okonkwo. (N. Park as medical staff, V. Lee and R. Esposito as drivers, and A. Diaz as parent observer do not count.)

question: Which roster version is operational for the trip?
reference_answer: Roster v3 (issued 2026-04-15) is operational. v1 and v2 are retained for audit only.

question: Per SCO-CH-3, which adult role has authority to direct student behavior and conduct headcount?
reference_answer: Chaperone (per SCO-CH-3, an adult assigned to general supervision with authority to direct student behavior and conduct headcount).

question: While in transit, may the bus driver be diverted to general supervision?
reference_answer: No. Per SCO-CH-3, while in transit the driver may not leave the driver's seat and does not count toward the ratio.

question: Who is responsible for medical coverage across all three groups?
reference_answer: School nurse N. Park, who provides medical coverage across all three groups; medical events escalate to N. Park.

question: What is the status of the return-leg attendance scans?
reference_answer: Pending. Return-leg scans will be appended after the trip and are not part of this packet (Section 8).

question: Does this packet include the tournament results?
reference_answer: No. Tournament results will be circulated by the regional organizers approximately 2026-05-04 and are not part of this packet.

question: Was roster v2.1 issued?
reference_answer: No. v2.1 was drafted on 2026-04-12 but not issued; the v2.1 reassignment of S-019 was rolled into v3.

question: According to v3, is S-022 assigned to Group C?
reference_answer: No. In v3 the duplicate Group C listing of S-022 is removed; S-022 is correctly assigned to Group B only.

question: Does the packet reproduce the school nurse's confidential file on S-018's withdrawal?
reference_answer: No. The school nurse's confidential file on S-018 is referenced but not reproduced in this packet.

question: Have the attendance scanner timestamps been audited against an external clock for this packet?
reference_answer: No. Section 5 states the scanner timestamps are nominally local time and have not been audited against an external clock for this packet.

question: Where roster v1 or v2 conflicts with v3, which version governs?
reference_answer: v3 governs. Section 9 states this packet supersedes the standalone roster versions where they conflict, and where v1 or v2 lists a student in a group that v3 has changed, v3 is operational.

question: What sources does the packet explicitly reference but not reproduce in full?
reference_answer: Section 9 lists: the school nurse's confidential file on S-018; CHPS-OF-12 full text; SCO-CH-3 full text; the Marwick University tournament participant agreement; and the bus driver licenses (originals with drivers, copies on file with Transportation Office). Accommodation requests AR-2026-027, AR-2026-029, AR-2026-031 are referenced; originals are filed with the school nurse.
